content.text:
Available pages for thomascarter613/monad-workspace:

- 1 Monad: Project Overview
  - 1.1 Product Vision and Goals
  - 1.2 Repository Structure and Navigation
  - 1.3 Getting Started (Local Development)
- 2 Core Architecture
  - 2.1 Architecture Principles and ADRs
  - 2.2 monad-core: The Durable Runtime Library
    - 2.2.1 Workspace, Manifest, and Repository Contract
    - 2.2.2 Diagnostics, Errors, and Output Formatting
  - 2.3 monad-cli: The Thin Interface Layer
- 3 Repository Intelligence Pipeline
  - 3.1 Repository Inspection and Bounded Traversal
  - 3.2 Repository Graph Model and Rendering
  - 3.3 Toolchain and Dependency Detection
  - 3.4 Repository Intelligence Policy Engine
- 4 Context Pack and Context Bridge
  - 4.1 RepositoryContextPack Model and Rendering
  - 4.2 Context Pack Export and the --write Flag
  - 4.3 Context Bridge: AI Handoff and Session Continuity
- 5 CLI Command Reference
  - 5.1 monad info and monad check
  - 5.2 monad inspect
  - 5.3 monad graph
  - 5.4 monad context
- 6 Verification and Quality System
  - 6.1 Verification Baseline Script (verify.sh)
  - 6.2 Verification Standards and Evidence Packets
  - 6.3 Markdown Frontmatter and Documentation Validation
- 7 Workflow and Delivery System
  - 7.1 Work Hierarchy: Epics, Work Packets, Tasks, and Deliverables
  - 7.2 Operating Model and Workflow Standards
- 8 Engineering Standards and Security
  - 8.1 Rust Coding and Testing Standards
  - 8.2 Security: File Operation and Command Execution Safety
- 9 GitHub Integration and Project Tooling
  - 9.1 GitHub Issue Templates
  - 9.2 Epic Issue Seeding Scripts
- 10 Glossary
